title: A Strange Kingdom in Elbaf
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Zoro, Unknown person #12, Road, Luffy as The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.
scene: The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, I just thought I'd blow this guy away first...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me... These are those rabid temple guardians?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm still full from the rabbit, so I'm just gonna send these guys flying!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you don't finish them off before the sun god get's here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, I'm not the one who busted the fireplace and let the flames spread!

summary: This part advances the Arrival in Elbaf through 23 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
